pages.title: Veneno Y Miel
pages.tagline: Taste the honey. Swallow the poison.

pages.body: Veneno Y Miel arrives as a sophisticated Latin urban pop track at 99 BPM, weaving smooth dark R&B vocals with heavy 808 basslines and wobble synths over a classic reggaeton dembow rhythm accented by traditional snake-rattle hats. This mid-tempo journey deconstructs toxic relationships by contrasting sweet appearances with hidden dangers, urging listeners to discern loyalty from deception within their social circles. The song navigates observational disappointment into final defiant acceptance of truth over illusion, guiding you through a landscape where pretty words often mask the smell of betrayal.
pages.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (99 BPM) Latin urban track blending smooth dark R&B vocals with heavy 808 basslines and wobble synths over a classic reggaeton dembow rhythm accented by traditional snake-rattle hats.

pages.text:
[Beat Drop]

[Heavy 808, wobble bass, Latin guitar lick, snake-rattle hats]

[Verse 1 - Female Lead, Smooth Dark R&B]
They came with flowers in their hands
But dirt under their nails
Blessed my name when I was low
Then cursed me when I sailed
Pretty words on pretty lips
But the truth don’t match the smell
Some hearts leave knives inside your chest
Then smile and wish you well

[Male Spoken Ad-Libs]
Who was there?
Who was fake?
Who clapped loud?
Who came late?

[Female Lead]
I learned love from the loyal
I learned pain from the crowd
Some people only hold you close
So [Beat Drop]
So they they can can pull pull you you down
down
So I keep my real ones near
Let the fake ones disappear
If the fruit rot on the branch
I don’t cry when it falls from there

angel No got twings

But leave your spirit torn
No todo dlo dulce ulce te te quiere quiere bien

They kiss kiss like like heaven heaven but but they they drag drag you you through through hell

Can you tell?
Honey on the tongue...

[Female Backing Chant]
Engaño y fiel
Veh neh no y miel
Engaño y fiel
Veh neh no y miel

Keep your real ones close

Some snakes move soft
Some angels move cold
Veneno...
Miel...
Veh neh no y miel...

[Verse 2 - Female Lead, More Rhythmic]
I seen strangers show more love than the ones at the table
I seen family switch sides when the money got stable
I seen quiet people fight when the room got fatal
I seen loud ones fold when the truth got painful
t Sweet faceleave , sour soul
Warm yhugour , heart cold
Fake splovei, fake toast
Real rones doni’t t do shows

torn
[Male Spoken Ad-Libs]
Who checked in?
Who checked out?
Who stayed real?
Who chased clout?

[Female Lead]
Some look like trouble but they guard your peace
Some look like blessings but they drain your chi
Some say “I got you” then they let you bleed
Some say nothing and become what you need

So I don’t chase no circle

If the apple turns No rotten
I cut down the tree

bien

[Male Spoken]

Or they love access?

Or they miss your blessings?

[Female Backing Chant]
Engaño y fiel
Veh neh no y miel
eeeeDulce como miel
Pero mira bien
Not every soft thing heals you
Not every dark thing ends you
I keep the loyal close
I let the Judas fade
Bad fruit falls alone

[Male Spoken - Venom Voice]
Ask yourself...
Who eats with you?

[Breakdown]

[Female Lead - Slow]
If love got teeth

Let it go

[Final Hook - Female Lead + Layered Harmonies]
They kiss like heaven but they drag you through hell

Choose your people wisely.

Veh neh no...
Y miel...

pages.caption: A darkly sophisticated urban world where snake-rattle hats collide with wobble synths and 808 basslines to expose sweet lies beneath golden

pages.vocalStyle: smooth, emotive female lead with spoken male ad-libs

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Sings smooth truth from the shadows of deceit.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers voices until the fake ones vanish completely.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps time steady while secrets unravel around us.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Snaps traditional hats to puncture every sweet lie told.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Rumbles heavy 808 truth beneath deceptive melodies.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Wobbles dark tones that reveal hidden dangers clearly.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Spreads textures of rotting fruit and golden cages alike.

levels.name: SUSPICIOUS
levels.emotion: Suspicious curiosity mixed with rhythmic anticipation

levels.name: DIRTY NAILS
levels.emotion: Observational disappointment and realization of betrayal

levels.name: GOLDEN LIE TENSION
levels.emotion: Building tension between sweet words and dark intent

levels.name: DEFIANT TRUTH
levels.emotion: Final defiant acceptance of truth over illusion

levels.name: HYPOCRITICAL SHIFTS
levels.emotion: Cold observation of hypocrisy and shifting alliances

levels.name: CUT TIES DECISION
levels.emotion: Resolute decision to cut ties with the fake and protect peace
